allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); proj=list\(d['projects'].values\(\)\)[0]; opts=proj.get\('architect',{}\).get\('build',{}\).get\('options',{}\); print\('SSR:', opts.get\('ssr'\)\); print\('prerender:', opts.get\('prerender'\)\); prod=proj.get\('architect',{}\).get\('build',{}\).get\('configurations',{}\).get\('production',{}\); print\('prod prerender:', prod.get\('prerender'\)\)")
